name: Music & Performing Arts
description: Music and performing arts perspectives highlight how AI affects creative rights, cultural authenticity, and the livelihoods of artists worldwide.

people.name: Deborah Annetts
people.description: Mobilizes the music sector against the threat generative AI poses to creative rights and calls for fair remuneration.

people.name: Kjartan Ólafsson
people.description: Advocates for ethical AI music frameworks that protect artist rights and maintain cultural authenticity.

trajectory: Understanding of intellectual property and creative rights directly informs AI training data governance.
Live performance expertise raises questions about authenticity, deepfakes, and AI impersonation in entertainment.
Music industry advocacy provides models for how creative communities can organize around AI safety concerns.
Cultural preservation perspectives ensure AI systems don't homogenize or erase diverse musical traditions.

projects.title: AI and creative rights framework
projects.description: Develop a framework protecting musicians and performers from unauthorized AI replication of their work and style.

projects.title: Cultural authenticity audit for AI music
projects.description: Evaluate whether AI music generation tools preserve or homogenize diverse cultural musical traditions.

projects.title: Fair remuneration models for AI-trained systems
projects.description: Design compensation models for artists whose work contributes to AI training data.
